creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #19)
Missing from the above:

I recompiled with the following added to the Makefile:

NO_CCACHE=      yes
CFLAGS+=        "-I/usr/local/openjdk8/include"

The full output is at: https://gist.github.com/dlangille/e25e977e8235b70d66278a02472a6797
